name: python3-pysam
title: python3-pysam
summary: interface for the SAM/BAM sequence alignment and mapping format (Python 3)
description:
interface for the SAM/BAM sequence alignment and mapping format (Python 3)
Pysam is a Python module for reading and manipulating Samfiles. It's a
lightweight wrapper of the samtools C-API. Pysam also includes an interface
for tabix.
.
This package installs the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pysam because interface for the SAM/BAM sequence alignment and mapping format (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pysam as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pysam with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pysam --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
